info.name: LuminiaEO API
info.description:
REST API for the LuminiaEO Laravel backend (keyword research, clusters, citations, SERP, page analysis, billing, admin ops).

## Base URL
Set `base_url` (e.g. `http://localhost` or your deployed origin). All routes below are under `/api`.

## Public extras
- **Auth → Google ID token login** — `POST /api/auth/google` (Google Sign-In `id_token`).
- **Contact (public)** — `POST /api/contact` (throttled).
- **Email verification** — `GET /api/email/verify/{id}/{hash}` (signed; use full URL from email or variables from that link).

## Session
- **User → Logout** — `POST /api/logout` (revokes current token).
- **User → Resend verification email** — `POST /api/email/verification-notification` (authenticated, throttled).

## Admin
All `GET/POST/.../api/admin/*` routes require `Authorization: Bearer` for a user with **`is_admin = true`**. Folders: **Admin — dashboard, users, backlinks, credit transactions, API logs, product activity, keyword clusters, subscriptions, system, contact submissions**, and **Admin — billable features** (features CRUD). See `docs/ADMIN_API_INTEGRATION.md` where applicable.

## Authentication (customers)
Protected routes use **Laravel Sanctum** personal access tokens. Call **Login** or use a token from your app, then set `auth_token`. Send header: `Authorization: Bearer {{auth_token}}` and `Accept: application/json`.

## Response shape (most endpoints)
Controllers using `ApiResponseModifier` return JSON:
```json
{
  "status": <http_status>,
  "message": "...",
  "response": { ... }
}
```
**Exceptions:** `GET /api/health` returns a plain `{ "status", "timestamp", "checks" }` object. Some flows (e.g. keyword ideas) may return other shapes.

## Credits
Several routes use the `credit.deduct` middleware (reserves/completes credits). Insufficient balance may yield **402** with a JSON body (see keyword clusters). Use **Billing → Balance** and **Features** to inspect costs.

## Rate limits (per user, per minute)
- Citations: 20
- Keyword research: 10
- Keyword clusters: 15
- Keyword planner: 20
- SEO / DataForSEO: 60
- SERP: 60
- FAQ: 30
- Page analysis: 30

## Stripe
`POST /api/billing/webhook` is for **Stripe** only (signature verification). Do not call from Postman unless you simulate Stripe signatures.

## Web OAuth
Google OAuth lives on **web** routes (`/google/authorize`, `/google/callback`), not under `/api`.

## Admin (billable features)
Folder **Admin — billable features**: `GET/POST/PATCH /api/admin/features*`. Requires **`is_admin`** user token (`403` otherwise). Documented in `docs/ADMIN_API_INTEGRATION.md`. Customer-facing feature list remains **Billing → Features** (`GET /api/billing/features`, active only).

item.name: Health & diagnostics
item.description: Operational checks. No authentication required.

request.description: Returns database, cache (Redis), and Redis connectivity. HTTP **200** with `status` `healthy`, or **200**/`503` with `degraded`/`unhealthy` in `checks`. Response is **not** wrapped in `ApiResponseModifier` format.
Sanctum unauthenticated fallback route. Returns **401** JSON when the framework redirects to login (e.g. missing Bearer token on protected routes).

item.name: Auth (public)
item.description: Registration, login, password reset. No Bearer token.

request.description: Creates a user. Name: letters/spaces only, 3–50 chars. Password: 8–20 chars, must match `password_confirmation`. New users may receive signup bonus credits per `config/billing.php`.
Returns `response.auth_token` (Sanctum plain text token) and `response.user`. Copy the token into collection variable `auth_token` for protected requests.
Email must **exist** in `users` (otherwise **422**). Sends reset mail with raw token for use with **Reset password**.
Token expires after 60 minutes. On success, invalidates all existing Sanctum tokens for that user.

Exchanges a Google `id_token` (from Google Identity Services) for a Sanctum token. Requires `GOOGLE_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID` to match the app. **401** if token invalid; **403** if account suspended; **409** if email matches an admin (password sign-in only).

item.name: Contact (public)
item.description: Throttled **5/min** per IP. No authentication.

request.description: `name` max 120; `message` 5–5000 chars. **201** with submission `id` in `response`.

item.name: Email verification (signed URL)
item.description: Laravel **signed** route from the verification email. You cannot forge `hash` in Postman; use the full URL from the mail, or the **Resend verification** request while authenticated.

request.description: Throttled 6/min. The signed URL includes `expires` and `signature` query params; paste the **complete** link from the email into the Postman URL bar, or set variables from that link. **400** if signature invalid or expired.

item.name: Location codes (public)
item.description: DataForSEO-style location codes for geo targeting. Cached; optional query filters on list.

request.description: Query params: `type`, `country_iso_code`, `countries_only` (bool), `search` (name like), `sort_by`, `sort_order`, `per_page` (max 500). Returns paginated `location_codes`.
All country-type locations, ordered by name.
Path parameter is numeric `location_code` (e.g. 2840). **404** if not found.

item.name: Billing — webhook (Stripe)
item.description: Not for manual API testing without a valid Stripe-Signature.

request.description: Handled by `StripeWebhookController`. Verifies Stripe signature. Configure endpoint in Stripe Dashboard; do not use from Postman in production.

item.name: User
item.description: Authenticated user profile. **Bearer token required.**

request.description: Returns the raw `User` model JSON (Laravel default), not the `ApiResponseModifier` envelope.

Send any combination of profile fields (`name`, `email`) and/or password change (`current_password`, `password`, `password_confirmation`). At least one group required. Returns updated `user` in `response`.
Revokes the **current** Sanctum personal access token. Other sessions/tokens remain valid until revoked.

Throttled **6/min**. **200** if link sent. If email already verified (or user is admin, treated as verified), **200** with informational message. Requires `not_suspended` and email flow middleware when applicable.

item.name: Admin — dashboard
item.description: Admin metrics. **Bearer + `is_admin`**. Plain JSON, not `ApiResponseModifier` envelope.

request.description: Cached aggregate stats for the admin home dashboard.
Cached time-series / chart data for the admin dashboard.

item.name: Admin — users
item.description: Customer users only: admin accounts are hidden from `show` (404) and cannot be suspended or credit-adjusted via these routes. **Bearer + `is_admin`**. Plain JSON responses.

request.description: Query: `page`, `per_page` (max 100), `search`, `suspended` (boolean). Paginated `data` + `meta`.
**201** — creates a customer user with default signup/billing behavior. Email must be unique.
Optional `include_product_activity=1` adds per-feature counts. **404** for admin user ids.
**403** if target is an admin account.
**403** if target is an admin account.
`amount` non-zero integer (max magnitude from `config('billing.admin_adjust_max_credits')`); positive adds, negative debits. Optional `note` (max 2000 chars). Returns `user` + `transaction`.

item.name: Admin — backlinks
item.description: Backlink review queue. **Bearer + `is_admin`**. Plain JSON.

request.description: Query: `status` optional `pending|verified|failed`, `domain` filter, pagination.
Includes related `seoTask` / user context when available.
Marks backlink as verified per admin service rules.
**204** No Content on success.

item.name: Admin — credit transactions
item.description: Wallet ledger for all users. **Bearer + `is_admin`**. Export returns **CSV** download.

request.description: Optional filters: `user_id`, `type` (string, max 64).
Same filters as list. Response is a streamed **CSV** file (save from Postman **Send and Download**).

item.name: Admin — API logs
item.description: Internal upstream API cache / resolve logs. **Bearer + `is_admin`**. See `context` in list response. Export is **CSV**.

request.description: Filter by `user_id`, `endpoint`, `method` (e.g. GET, POST).
Streamed **CSV**.

item.name: Admin — product activity
item.description: User-facing product runs (per feature). **Bearer + `is_admin`**. Paginated `data` + `meta` on all list routes.

request.description: Metadata describing each activity type / route.
Optional `user_id`, `status`.
Optional `user_id`, `status`.
Optional `user_id`, `status`.
Optional `user_id`.
Optional `user_id`.
Optional `user_id`.
Optional `user_id`.
Optional `status`, `domain` filters.
Optional `user_id`, `status`.

item.name: Admin — keyword clusters (snapshots)
item.description: Browse persisted cluster snapshots. **Bearer + `is_admin`**. `GET .../snapshots` returns all snapshots sharing the same cluster key as the given row.

request.description: Paginated list of `KeywordClusterSnapshot` rows.
`id` is a **cluster snapshot** id; response lists related snapshots in `data`.

item.name: Admin — subscriptions
item.description: Laravel Cashier subscriptions (if `subscriptions` table exists). **Bearer + `is_admin`**. Plain JSON.

request.description: Paginated Cashier subscriptions.
Includes `items` when present. **404** if table missing.

item.name: Admin — system
item.description: Cache, health, announcements. **Bearer + `is_admin`**. Plain JSON.

request.description: **200** `{ "ok": true }` after `Cache::flush()`-style clear.
Admin-oriented health JSON (not identical to public `/api/health` unless shared implementation).
**201** with announcement payload. `body` up to 65535 chars.

item.name: Admin — contact submissions
item.description: Messages from `POST /api/contact`. **Bearer + `is_admin`**. Plain JSON.

request.description: Newest first by id.
Full message and timestamps.

item.name: Admin — billable features
item.description:
CRUD-style management of the `features` table (credit cost, name, active flag). **Bearer token must belong to a user with `is_admin = true`.** Non-admins get **403**. Responses are plain JSON (not `ApiResponseModifier`). **No DELETE** — features cannot be removed via API. Set `admin_feature_id` from **List features** before **Update feature**.

See `docs/ADMIN_API_INTEGRATION.md`.

request.description: **200** — `{ "data": [ { id, key, name, credit_cost, is_active, created_at, updated_at }, ... ] }` ordered by `key`. No pagination wrapper.

`key` required: lowercase snake `^[a-z][a-z0-9_]*$`, unique. `name`, `credit_cost` (0–999999) required. `is_active` optional (default true). **201** returns a single feature object. **422** if key invalid or duplicate.
At least one of `name`, `credit_cost`, `is_active` required (`key` cannot be changed). **200** returns updated feature. **404** unknown id. **422** if body empty.

item.name: Citations
item.description: AI citation visibility checks for a URL. **Bearer required.** Throttle **20/min**. `POST /analyze` uses **credit.deduct**.

request.description: Body: `url` (required, max 2048), `num_queries` optional (min 10, max from `config/citations.max_queries`, default from config). **202** with `task_id`, `status_url`, `results_url`.
Poll progress. Task must belong to authenticated user.
Full citation results per query (GPT/Gemini), scores, competitors. Ownership enforced.
Dispatches partial chunks for queries missing from `results.by_query`. **400** if nothing to retry.

item.name: Keyword research
item.description: Async keyword research jobs. **Bearer required.** Throttle **10/min**. `POST /` uses **credit.deduct**.

body.raw:
{
  "query": "best running shoes",
  "language_code": "en",
  "geo_target_id": 2840,
  "max_keywords": 500,
  "enable_google_planner": true,
  "enable_scraper": true,
  "enable_clustering": true,
  "enable_intent_scoring": true
}

request.description: `query` required. Defaults: `language_code` en, `geo_target_id` 2840, feature flags true. **201** on create; duplicate job may reverse credit reservation.
Lists the authenticated user's keyword research jobs (service-defined shape).
Poll job status by numeric `id`.
Fetch completed research payload when ready.

item.name: Keyword clusters
item.description: Hierarchical keyword clustering via external engine. **Bearer required.** Throttle **15/min**. Credits reserved in controller (not `credit.deduct` middleware). May return **402** JSON for insufficient credits.

request.description: `keyword` required. Defaults: `language_code` en, `location_code` 2840. Responses: **200** cache hit (tree in `payload`), **202** async job (`job_id`, poll URLs), **503** if lock busy.
Numeric `id` only. Returns `status`, `snapshot_id`, error fields.
**409** if not ready; **422** if job failed; **200** with `payload` (tree) when completed.

item.name: Keyword planner
item.description: Google Keyword Planner + DataForSEO + clustering helpers. **Bearer required.** Throttle **20/min**. Credit-backed routes use reservation completion.

request.description: Query: `keyword` (required). **credit.deduct**. Returns `{ status, count, data }` style JSON on success (not the standard ApiResponseModifier envelope).

Either `keyword` OR `keywords` array required. Optional: `location_code`, `language_code`, `limit` (1–1000), `top_n` (1–100). **credit.deduct** — only **completed** (charged) on first creation of a shared `informational_planner_queries` row (pooled, default TTL `INFORMATIONAL_PLANNER_DEDUP_TTL_DAYS`). Other users: credits **reversed**. Response: `saved_id` = that query’s id, `served_from` `fresh` | `shared_pool`.
`target` required (domain/site string). Defaults: location 2840, language en, `search_partners` true. **credit.deduct**.
`target` required. `enable_clustering` defaults true; `num_clusters` 2–50 or auto-derived. **credit.deduct**.

item.name: SEO — DataForSEO
item.description: Direct DataForSEO-backed keyword and backlink APIs. **Bearer required.** Throttle **60/min** on group. Backlink **submit** uses **credit.deduct**.

request.description: `keywords` array required (1–100 items, each max 255 chars). Optional `language_code` (2 chars), `location_code`.
Same body shape as planner keywords-for-site; uses `KeywordsForSiteRequest` with defaults location 2840, language en, `search_partners` true.
`domain` must be a valid URL string. Optional `limit` 1–1000 (default from config). **credit.deduct**. Returns `task_id` and backlink payload when ready.
JSON body `task_id` required. Ownership enforced.
JSON body `task_id` required. Full `results` payload.
`domain` URL required. Optional `risk_levels` array: `low`, `medium`, `high`, `critical` (default high+critical).

item.name: SERP
item.description: SERP keyword data and organic results. **Bearer required.** Throttle **60/min**.

request.description: `keywords`: 1–100 strings. Defaults: `language_code` en, `location_code` 2840. Optional `options` object passed to SERP service.
**Exactly one** keyword in `keywords` array; **422** otherwise.

item.name: FAQ
item.description: FAQ generation from URL or topic. **Bearer required.** Throttle **30/min**. `generate` and `task` POST use **credit.deduct**.

request.description: `input` required, max 2048 chars. Optional `options.temperature` 0–1.
Returns `task_id` and initial `status`. Poll GET task status.
Progressive FAQ questions/answers (SERP + PAA), max 10 questions in response. Ownership enforced.

item.name: Page analysis
item.description: Meta optimization, semantic scoring, content outlines via page-analysis services. **Bearer required.** Throttle **30/min**. POST endpoints use **credit.deduct** (with cache-aware completion where implemented).

request.description: `url` required (valid URL, max 2048). `keyword` optional.
Paginated meta analyses for current user.
Evaluates page vs keyword semantics via external service.
Paginated semantic analyses.
`keyword` required. `tone` optional: professional, casual, academic, persuasive, informative (default professional).
Paginated content outlines.

item.name: Billing (authenticated)
item.description: Credit wallet, Stripe checkout, and feature pricing. **Bearer required.** (Webhook is under separate folder.)

request.description: Returns `credits_balance` in `response`.
Query: `per_page` (max 100), `page`, `type` optional: purchase, usage, refund, bonus, adjustment.
**Active** billable features with `credit_cost` (customer-facing). For admin list/create/update (all rows, including inactive) use folder **Admin — billable features**.
Min/max credits, increment, cents per credit from config.
`credits` must satisfy min, max, and increment from purchase rules (defaults often min 100, step 10). Returns `checkout_url` and `session_id`.
Idempotent: applies credits from a paid Stripe Checkout session if not already credited. Validates session belongs to current user.
